description: Assign or initialize values to all gridpoints in the range. Keywords available can be chosen from the following list:

6.0.reason: Not listed in the official FLAC3D 6.0 command indexes.

7.0.description: Assign or initialize values to all gridpoints in the range. Keywords available can be chosen from the following list:

keywords.name: displacement
keywords.description: Gridpoint displacement.

keywords.name: displacement-x
keywords.description: Gridpoint displacement in the \(x\)-direction.

keywords.name: displacement-y
keywords.description: Gridpoint displacement in the \(y\)-direction.

keywords.name: displacement-z
keywords.description: Gridpoint displacement in the \(z\)-direction.

keywords.name: displacement-small
keywords.description: Accumulated small-strain displacement at a gridpoint (used in interface calculations).

keywords.name: displacement-small-x
keywords.description: Accumulated small-strain \(x\)-displacement at a gridpoint (used in interface calculations).

keywords.name: displacement-small-y
keywords.description: Accumulated small-strain \(y\)-displacement at a gridpoint (used in interface calculations).

keywords.name: displacement-small-z
keywords.description: Accumulated small-strain \(z\)-displacement at a gridpoint (used in interface calculations).

keywords.name: extra
keywords.description: Extra grid variable for extra array index i and a. [CS: this seems like a pretty thin description; previously was flagged for that reason]

keywords.name: position
keywords.description: Position of a gridpoint.

keywords.name: position-x
keywords.description: \(x\)-coordinate of gridpoint

keywords.name: position-y
keywords.description: \(y\)-coordinate of gridpoint

keywords.name: position-z
keywords.description: \(z\)-coordinate of gridpoint

keywords.name: ratio-target
keywords.description: Specifies the target local force ratio that is considered to be converged for mechanical calculations. The default value is 1e-4. A local force ratio of this value will result in a convergence value of 1.0 for the gridpoint. See the convergence keyword in the model solve command.

keywords.name: velocity
keywords.description: Velocity of a gridpoint.

keywords.name: velocity-x
keywords.description: \(x\)-velocity of gridpoint

keywords.name: velocity-y
keywords.description: \(y\)-velocity of gridpoint

keywords.name: velocity-z
keywords.description: \(z\)-velocity of gridpoint

keywords.name: add
keywords.description: Add the specified value to the existing value.

keywords.name: gradient
keywords.description: Apply a gradient to the scalar-value provided.

keywords.name: local
keywords.description: Specify that the value supplied for the keyword is in the local coordinate system of the gridpoint (if any). By default values are initialize in the global system. This keyword cannot be used with the following keywords of the zone gridpoint initialize command: extra.

keywords.name: multiply
keywords.description: Multiply the existing value by the specified value.

keywords.name: vary
keywords.description: Apply a linear variation to the scalar-value provided.

keywords.name: biot
keywords.description: Biot modulus for fluid-flow model (see See Biot Coefficient and Biot Modulus ). Only available if the model configure fluid has been given.

keywords.name: displacement
keywords.description: Gridpoint displacement.

keywords.name: displacement-x
keywords.description: Gridpoint displacement in the \(x\) -direction.

keywords.name: displacement-y
keywords.description: Gridpoint displacement in the \(y\) -direction.

keywords.name: displacement-z
keywords.description: Gridpoint displacement in the \(z\) -direction.

keywords.name: displacement-small
keywords.description: Accumulated small-strain displacement at a gridpoint (used in interface calculations).

keywords.name: displacement-small-x
keywords.description: Accumulated small-strain \(x\) -displacement at a gridpoint (used in interface calculations).

keywords.name: displacement-small-y
keywords.description: Accumulated small-strain \(y\) -displacement at a gridpoint (used in interface calculations).

keywords.name: displacement-small-z
keywords.description: Accumulated small-strain \(z\) -displacement at a gridpoint (used in interface calculations).

keywords.name: extra
keywords.description: Extra grid variable for extra array index i and a . [CS: this seems like a pretty thin description; previously was flagged for that reason]

keywords.name: force-applied
keywords.description: The total applied force at a gridpoint. This includes all sources, including forces due to gravity.

keywords.name: force-applied-x
keywords.description: The total applied force in the \(x\) direction at a gridpoint. This includes all sources, including forces due to gravity.

keywords.name: force-applied-y
keywords.description: The total applied force in the \(y\) direction at a gridpoint. This includes all sources, including forces due to gravity.

keywords.name: force-applied-z
keywords.description: The total applied force in the \(z\) direction at a gridpoint. This includes all sources, including forces due to gravity.

keywords.name: fluid-modulus
keywords.description: Fluid bulk modulus for fluid-flow model (can only be used for biot c = 1; see the material in Fluid-Mechanical Interaction ). Only available if the model configure fluid has been given.

keywords.name: fluid-tension
keywords.description: Fluid tension limit for fluid-flow model (tension is negative, value is -1e15 by default; see the material in Fluid-Mechanical Interaction ). Only available if the model configure fluid has been given.

keywords.name: head
keywords.description: Uses Head to initialize Pore Pressure at gridpoint. Fluid Density and Gravity need to be previously defined. Note that if the pore-pressure is changed this will not affect the total stress, but will change the effective stress. The zone gridpoint fix pore-pressure or zone gridpoint fix head commands can be used to change the total stress and leave the effective stress constant.

keywords.name: multiplier
keywords.description: Integer multiplier of the gridpoint used in dynamic multi-stepping.

keywords.name: position
keywords.description: Position of a gridpoint.

keywords.name: position-x
keywords.description: \(x\) -coordinate of gridpoint

keywords.name: position-y
keywords.description: \(y\) -coordinate of gridpoint

keywords.name: position-z
keywords.description: \(z\) -coordinate of gridpoint

keywords.name: pore-pressure
keywords.description: Pore Pressure at gridpoint. Note that if the pore-pressure is changed this will not affect the total stress, but will change the effective stress. The zone gridpoint fix pore-pressure command can be used to change the total stress and leave the effective stress constant.

keywords.name: ratio-target
keywords.description: Specifies the target local force ratio that is considered to be converged for mechanical calculations. The default value is 1e-4. A local force ratio of this value will result in a convergence value of 1.0 for the gridpoint. See the convergence keyword in the model solve command.

keywords.name: saturation
keywords.description: Saturation at the gridpoint. Only available if the model configure fluid has been given.

keywords.name: temperature
keywords.description: temperature at the gridpoint. Only available if the model configure thermal has been given.

keywords.name: velocity
keywords.description: Velocity of a gridpoint.

keywords.name: velocity-x
keywords.description: \(x\) -velocity of gridpoint

keywords.name: velocity-y
keywords.description: \(y\) -velocity of gridpoint

keywords.name: velocity-z
keywords.description: \(z\) -velocity of gridpoint

keywords.name: add
keywords.description: Add the specified value to the existing value.

keywords.name: gradient
keywords.description: Apply a gradient to the scalar-value provided. Note the origin keyword is optional, however, the default value (0,0,0) is used if the origin keyword is not included in the command — which may not produce the intended result.

keywords.name: local
keywords.description: Specify that the value supplied for the keyword is in the local coordinate system of the gridpoint (if any). By default values are initialize in the global system. This keyword cannot be used with the following keywords of the zone gridpoint initialize command: extra .

keywords.name: multiply
keywords.description: Multiply the existing value by the specified value.

keywords.name: vary
keywords.description: Apply a linear variation to the scalar-value provided.

keywords.name: force
keywords.description: initialize the applied force vector at gridpoints in the range

keywords.name: force-x
keywords.description: initialize the x-component of the applied force at gridpoints in the range

keywords.name: force-y
keywords.description: initialize the y-component of the applied force at gridpoints in the range

keywords.name: force-z
keywords.description: initialize the z-component of the applied force at gridpoints in the range
